name: mashi
description: Read your unified work data — board, meetings, messages, Linear, calendar — across every connected source.
long_description: Mashi is a personal chief-of-staff system that pulls Gmail, Slack, Linear, Fireflies, and Google Calendar into one place. This extension exposes that unified surface as MCP tools so Claude can answer 'what do we know about X' with one tool call instead of hitting five distributed MCPs and trying to reconcile the results. Tools are read-only and scoped to your own data via a personal API token.

mashi_base_url.title: Mashi base URL
mashi_base_url.description: Defaults to the hosted Mashi. Override only for local dev (http://localhost:3456).

tools.name: whoami
tools.description: Who is currently signed in, what's connected, summary counts.

tools.name: list_today
tools.description: Today's calendar + urgent + sprint items + items resurfacing from snooze.

tools.name: search_board
tools.description: Search S2D items by query, pathway, priority, status, company.

tools.name: search_meetings
tools.description: Search Fireflies meetings by query, company, or date.

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search Gmail + Slack messages by query, sender, source, date.

tools.name: search_linear
tools.description: Search Linear issues by query, status, priority, assignee, company.

tools.name: search_everything
tools.description: One-shot search across board, meetings, messages, Linear.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Full S2D item by id or ticket number (MASH-N).

tools.name: get_message_thread
tools.description: Every message in a Gmail thread or Slack conversation.

tools.name: get_linear_issue
tools.description: Linear issue by id, external_id, or URL.

tools.name: get_calendar_event
tools.description: Calendar event by id or external_id.

tools.name: who_is
tools.description: Cross-source lookup for a person by name or email — gathers meetings, messages, Linear assignments, S2D mentions.

tools.name: context_for_item
tools.description: Full source-side context for an S2D item — every linked Gmail thread, Slack convo, Linear issue, Fireflies meeting.
